title: Section 17
content: (1) The Dean of 1[each Institute] shall be appointed on such terms and conditions as may be laid down by the Statutes and shall exercise such powers and perform such duties as may be assigned to him by this Act or the Statutes or the Director.. (2) The Dean shall report to the Director.
footnote: 1. Subs. by Act 43 of 2021, s. 19, for "the Institute" (w.e.f. 25-5-2022).
